Hey, what's going on everyone? Welcome to the Two Step Set Close Script. So this script is a script that you would use if you're having difficulty with show rates for a manual process. So if you were following the original script and for some reason your show rates are not doing as well as you would like, then this is a heavier script that will further pre-qualify the people that you were on the phone with. So it will take a little bit more time, but the payoff is that you will get a significantly higher show rate. And so the objective of this script is to get a card that you will not charge, but you will say that they will be putting a card down for a $50 no-show fee if they don't show up. And so the beauty of this is they're seeing that you're taking it seriously. And even if for some reason they don't give you the card, you make them swear on their life that they're going to come and then they usually will because they understand that they are meeting with a qualified expert. Alright, so let's read through it together. So it's like, hey Sarah, this is Alex from the Six Week Challenge. How's it going? Awesome. That's great. I'm just looking over your application and I see that you're super motivated. I hope you're a good fit for our program. So a quick question. What part of town do you live in? This is a script that you can implement. If you're having trouble with show up rates, I will say that I have setting closed for myself before in the past, and use a different name that is up to you. If you have an employee who can can call these leads for you and do the setting, that would obviously be more effective because it will edify you as the closer. So this is a script to implement. If you are struggling with show rates, I would define struggling as if you have probably less than 40% show rate from the original script. This is when it would make sense to do that. If you're getting 50% show rate, just stick with the original script. You'll be able to do more volume. This one takes a little bit more time, but the tradeoff is if you're not getting people to show up, then you're going to need to do more proof off on the phone. So that is the that is the the miracle center script that you can use to get people to show up. And that is the name of the game.
